nasb.text: So Jesus, knowing all the things that were coming upon Him, went forth and *said to them, “Whom do you seek?”

esv.text: Then Jesus, knowing all that would happen to him, came forward and said to them, “Whom do you seek?”

cnv.text: 耶穌知道快要臨到他身上的一切事，就出來對他們說：“你們找誰？”

ccb.text: 耶稣早就知道将要发生在自己身上的一切事，于是出来问他们：“你们找谁？”

csbs.text: 耶稣知道就要临到自己的一切，于是上前对他们说：“你们找谁？”
